data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Amazon services are equipped with protection against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Integration with AWS Shield for DDoS mitigation strategies.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Robust identity management controls to ensure proper access levels.
data.technical_spec: Use of AWS IAM to manage permissions and control user access.

data.title: Encryption at Rest and In Transit
data.description: Data is encrypted both at rest and in transit to ensure data confidentiality.
data.technical_spec: Utilization of encryption standards and key management services like AWS KMS.

data.title: Security Monitoring and Logging
data.description: Continuous monitoring of networks and systems for anomalies and potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Use of services like AWS CloudTrail and CloudWatch for logging and analysis.

data.title: End-user Security Practices
data.description: Implementation of security features and user education to protect end-users.
data.technical_spec: Features include multi-factor authentication and regular user training.
